title: The Forgotten Dimensions
description: Explore new dimensions and challenge their champions
body:
***Requires Geckolib api and Curios api***
**As of June 2026, the mod is still in development, next update will be when  Ryumsky is atleast playable, which is not right now**


# Explore new dimensions and challenge their Champions!

## **The Permafrost Dimension** 
adds a new full dimension with high quality content.

Different biomes, mobs, gear and bosses

Explore a frozen deathland, everything here is extremely dangeours, almost every mob will be aggresive upon sight, even against themselves, be prepared to fight and survive!.

Be careful with your temperature! extremely low temperatures may and WILL be your demise in this dimension, not only the constant peril of dying is here, as you freeze, several debuffs will being affecting you and get you weaker.

Watch out your sorroudings, in any time a blizzard may start, and if you are not prepared, 
another death awaits you

![The blizzard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iOMf65x8/images/4110e1be4cbd9f7a430645ac381bee64389b6558.png)

Be prepared to fight the pure ice!, the mod comes with an elemental damage system that pierces vanilla armor!
And of course the mod comes with weapons and armor prepared for that type of damage, even the strongest armor will fall upon the pure Ice element.

This also means you need to be prepared for fighting Powerful bosses, From mid to extremely hard bosses, such as the mighty ***[The Permafrost Beast](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YA7bHzMILLQ)*** and the Legendary ***[The Ice Phoenix](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=68kvG6_vup8)***
![The ice phoenix](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iOMf65x8/images/0cbc99b98b6bebaf1a5c87ac45b49db6b41efda7.png)
Do not worry! Ice melts against the Hottest Fire, with the proper gear no one will be able to stop you, not even the Permafrost Champion, which is still awaiting for his seal to be broken, will you dare to broke the seal lost inside the ice labyrinth?

And to enter you need to find the natural generated portal, look out for biomes with low temperatures and far from the spawn (1K blocks atleast)
